title: Charmin pricing math + USPS stamping route — pandemic family hustle
html:
TL;DR

  • Mid-March 2020 (the literal first week of US lockdown) — Iracema was running a Facebook Marketplace / Amazon-FBA-adjacent toilet-paper resale operation out of Grants Pass, with Yahir scribbling the unit-economics on his phone.
  • The note compares Charmin Ultra-Soft 18-pack at $18 vs Kroger generic 12-pack at $9 — meaning Fred Meyer / Kroger-store-brand was the arbitrage source against the premium SKU.
  • The price ladder ($5.29 / $5 / $5.99 / $2.99 / $6.49 / $2.49 / $3.69) with quantities and totals is mom's wholesale buy-cost spreadsheet, written in Yahir's notes app because he was the family's literate intermediary.
  • Five usps tracking-number lines for shipped packages — the back-office of a one-woman shipping operation. Names redacted; this is the early COVID hustle that pairs with Facebook Marketplace pandemic watchlist from two weeks later.
  • This is the same bridge income hustle thread that runs through 2019 11 13 coding zeal ("quarantine business for dad") and the FBA references in later notes — Yahir as family-business CFO from age 16.

Key facts

  • Capture: 2020-03-13 (US national emergency declared the same day, March 13 2020)
  • Pricing comparator: Charmin Ultra-Soft 18 / $18 vs Kroger generic 12 / $9 — implies he was tracking which store-brand replacement to recommend to mom's wholesale customers.
  • Errand list: "Fred — 7 / Bottle drip / Staples / USPS" — local stamping route through Fred Meyer, the bottle-drip recycling, staples, and the post office. Pure Grants Pass small-town errand stack.
  • Five USPS tracking numbers (94001/94055-prefix labels — domestic Priority/First Class) — recipient names redacted in this summary for privacy, but the operation is unambiguous: she was shipping to retail customers.

Why it matters in the graph

  • Datestamps the pandemic era family hustle — March 13, 2020 is the day-zero moment for Yahir's grocery-arbitrage memory. Pairs with the watchlist Yahir built two weeks later for the same purpose.
  • Confirms Iracema as the actual operator of a multi-customer shipping operation, not just a one-off side hustle. That's a different shape than "mom sells stuff online" — she had recurring buyers and a USPS workflow.
  • The bridge income pattern is consistent: when there's stress, Yahir + family pivot to scrappy commerce. The pandemic-paper-products hustle prefigures the same instinct in 2025 09 23 how im scraping by ("call mom about FBA business").
  • Yahir's role is documentary — he's not running the hustle, he's recording it. Same instinct that produces this entire vault: the family's-knowledge-broker pattern named explicitly in emilio and yahir family.

Connections / wikilinks

iracema vargas · grants pass or · fred meyer · usps · fb marketplace · covid pandemic era · bridge income strategies · 2020 03 30 facebook pandemic watchlist · yahir family · 2019 11 13 coding zeal

Privacy

USPS recipient names (5) and full tracking numbers from raw note redacted from this summary; raw apple-notes/ file is preserved untouched. The names appear to be retail customers, not family.
